title: Messages
description: Communicate with your team and clients
noChatsDescription: Start a conversation with a client to begin messaging. Your chat history will appear here.
errorLoadingChatsDescription: We couldn't load your messages. Please check your connection and try again.
selectChatMessage: Select a conversation to view messages
selectChatDescription: Choose a conversation from the list to start chatting
newChatDescription: Start a new conversation with a client
subject: Subject
subjectPlaceholder: Enter a brief subject for your message
subjectHelper: A clear subject helps your team respond faster
messageHelper: Describe your question or request in detail
newChatFailed: Failed to start conversation. Please try again.
subjectMinLength: Subject must be at least 3 characters
subjectMaxLength: Subject must be less than 100 characters
messageMinLength: Message must be at least 10 characters
messageMaxLength: Message must be less than 1000 characters
selectClientPlaceholder: Choose a client to chat with...
selectClientHelper: Choose which client to start a conversation with
clientIdRequired: Please select a client to start a conversation
startTyping: Start typing to send a message
emptyStateDescription: This is where you'll communicate with your clients. Start a new conversation to get started.
noChatsWithClient: No conversations with this client yet
startConversationWithClient: Start a conversation to discuss this request with the client.
